channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 ultraworkers/claw-code (178597 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ultraworkers

📝 Repository: ultraworkers/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The repo is finally unlocked. enjoy the party! The fastest repo in history to surpass 100K stars ⭐. Join Discord: https://discord.gg/5TUQKqFWd Built in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 178597

🍴 Forks: 106075

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-09T04:30:43Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 instructkr/claw-code (78050 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: instructkr

📝 Repository: instructkr/claw-code

📄 Descrizione: The fastest repo in history to surpass 50K stars ⭐, reaching the milestone in just 2 hours after publication. Better Harness Tools, not merely storing the archive of leaked Claude Code but make real things done. Now rewriting in Rust using oh-my-codex.

⭐ Stelle: 78050

🍴 Forks: 77259

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T08:58:08Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-01T04:45:31Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 googleworkspace/cli (23239 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: googleworkspace

📝 Repository: googleworkspace/cli

📄 Descrizione: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills.

⭐ Stelle: 23239

🍴 Forks: 1139

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agent automation cli discovery-api gemini-cli-extension google-admin google-api google-calendar google-chat google-docs google-drive google-sheets google-workspace oauth2 rust

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-02T19:46:06Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-31T04:32:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 nashsu/AutoCLI (1997 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/AutoCLI

📄 Descrizione: AutoCLI is a Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl), now powered by AutoCLI.ai .

⭐ Stelle: 1997

🍴 Forks: 180

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-24T03:04:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-09T03:24:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🦀 nashsu/opencli-rs (1585 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nashsu

📝 Repository: nashsu/opencli-rs

📄 Descrizione: Opencli-rs is a Blazing fast, memory-safe command-line tool — Fetch information from any website with a single command. Covers Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, HackerNews, Bilibili, Zhihu, Xiaohongshu, and 55+ sites, with support for controlling Electron desktop apps, integrating local CLI tools (gh, docker, kubectl), now powered by AutoCLI.ai .

👤 Owner: Infatoshi

📝 Repository: Infatoshi/OpenSquirrel

📄 Descrizione: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it.

item.title: 🦀 joaoh82/rustunnel (612 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: joaoh82

📝 Repository: joaoh82/rustunnel

📄 Descrizione: **Rustunnel** is an open-source tunnel that scales with you. Don't pay for idle time. Secure, Rust-fast, and Pay-as-you-go.. It exposes local services running behind NAT/firewalls to the public internet through a relay server self-hosted or our managed service.

⭐ Stelle: 612

🍴 Forks: 44

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: api-gateway reverse-proxy rust rustunnel

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

item.title: 🦀 erweixin/RaTeX (495 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: erweixin

📝 Repository: erweixin/RaTeX

📄 Descrizione: KaTeX-compatible LaTeX math renderer in pure Rust. No JavaScript, no WebView, no DOM. One Rust core → iOS, Android, Flutter, Web, PNG. C ABI · WASM · Server-side PNG. ~99% KaTeX syntax coverage.

⭐ Stelle: 495

🍴 Forks: 21

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: android ffi flutter ios katex latex math math-rendering rust wasm web-components
